title: Schauwerk Live Companion and Visual Truth v1
goal: Close the gap between deterministic Schauwerk composition and observable Miro reality through provider-reference drift checks, a deployable Web SDK companion contract, authenticated visual evidence and a small Golden Board corpus.
completion: The Miro capability audit separates the observed live catalogue, an explicit official-reference snapshot and Schauwerk adapter coverage without claiming provider support that is not live.
The Web SDK companion has a deterministic release manifest and HTTPS deployment doctor while Developer App registration, installation and authorization remain explicit external gates.
Authenticated provider captures can be validated and receipt-bound to an exact repeatable board snapshot without accepting login, access-denied or unauthenticated pages as evidence.
Three intentionally distinct Golden Board compositions pass deterministic package, preview and quality checks.
Implementation, tests, CI, complete diff, diff-bound review and post-merge validation are complete; any remaining provider-side gate is recorded precisely.

metadata.authorization: User authorized public HTTPS companion deployment and the associated Miro Developer App path on 2026-07-17.
